title: Directions: left, right, near, far
subtitle: Understand and give small directions.
duolingoBridge: Useful beside Duolingo city, travel, transport, and asking-for-directions sentences.
overview: Knowledge point 1: à gauche and à droite are essential direction chunks.
Knowledge point 2: près de and loin de help describe distance.

items.en: The station is on the left.
items.es: La estación está a la izquierda.

items.en: The café is on the right.
items.es: El café está a la derecha.

items.fr: L'école est près de la maison.
items.en: The school is near the house.
items.es: La escuela está cerca de la casa.

items.fr: Le magasin est en face de la gare.
items.en: The shop is across from the station.
items.es: La tienda está enfrente de la estación.
